refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly address the key components of worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are distinct functional aspects necessary for comprehensive site modeling.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, identified obstacles, and clearly defined work zones, validated against ground truth data or site surveys.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
Apply GIS-based spatial data processing for work-zone representation.
Integrate sensor data with a centralized mapping algorithm to generate a unified worksite model.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrate sensor data (LIDAR, cameras) with GIS-based spatial processing to generate a unified worksite model including terrain, obstacles, and work zones.

potential_sources: Data fusion between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
Integration of work-zone representation with sensor data processing.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates the sub-FRs with manageable coupling through well-defined data fusion and GIS processing steps.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of data inconsistency or latency affecting model accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust validation of mapping outputs.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data processing and GIS mapping to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and generation of the worksite model integrating sensor data and GIS spatial analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between NGHE Solution and other modules for real-time updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite model generation is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module provides sensor data but does not perform mapping; high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation uses mapping data but should not generate it; high diffusion risk.
Safety Services consumes safety alerts, not involved in mapping; very high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution becomes a single point of failure.
Dependency on timely and accurate sensor data input from Vehicle and Teleoperation.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider distributed processing if latency or scalability issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain, obstacle, and work-zone analysis to integrated sensor and GIS processing.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity and ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's output against known site data and ensuring interface correctness.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider defining performance metrics and monitoring for NGHE Solution to mitigate bottleneck risks.
Clarify data update frequency and latency requirements in interface specifications.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with manageable risks and clear ownership. No immediate need to revise or zigzag.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are sound and meet criteria.

assumptions: Sensor data availability and quality are sufficient for mapping.
NGHE Solution module has capacity for centralized processing.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
Validation data comparing generated models to actual site conditions.
